programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Mexico City Jumping - GCL R1 Competition Team
programme.desc: Held at Campo Marte in Mexico City, featuring CSI5* show jumping with fences up to 1.60m. The program includes the Global Champions League team competition and the Grand Prix, where riders earn ranking points toward the season standings. Competition takes place at altitude, impacting horse performance and pace.

programme.title: Sebastian Baez (ARG) vs Miomir Kecmanovic (SRB) - ATP 250 Generali Open 2026
programme.desc: The Generali Open 2026 is an ATP 250 clay-court event held in Kitzbühel, Austria, from 20 to 25 July. Staged at the Kitzbühel Tennis Stadium and offering €612,620 in prize money, the tournament is one of the ATP Tour’s traditional Alpine stops, with players competing for the title on outdoor clay.

programme.title: FAR Rabat (MAR) vs Mamelodi Sundowns (RSA) - CAF Champions League 2025/26 - Final
programme.desc: The CAF Champions League, is an annual club football competition organized by the Confederation of African Football (CAF) and contested by top-division African clubs. It is the most prestigious club competition in African football and is live and exclusive only on beIN. The current champions are Pyramids Football Club from Egypt.

programme.title: Freiburg vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Rayo Vallecano - UEFA Conference League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.title: Al Ahli (KSA) vs FC Machida Zelvia (JPN) - AFC Champions League Elite 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Elite is contested by Asia's top-division football clubs. It is the most prestigious club competition in Asian football, played by the national league champions. A total of 24 clubs compete in the league stage of the competition, divided into East and West regions (12 teams each). All games are live and exclusive only on be

programme.title: EPL Stories 2026/2027 EP.2 Pochettino's Spurs
programme.desc: Mauricio Pochettino’s unforgettable Tottenham Hotspur side playing fearless, high-intensity football and built around a young core of stars, Pochettino’s Spurs came within touching distance of Premier League and Champions League glory, creating some of the club’s greatest modern nights along the way. programme.desc: Latest news from the beIn SPORTS News room, previewing and reviewing developments and scores with contribution from around the world from beIN's reporters.

programme.title: Al Jawla
programme.desc: Al Jawla covers the latest news and stories from sporting events across the planet. Including latest results and latest scores from the most recent games taking place. This daily look at the latest stories provides a fast paced update to sporting events.

programme.title: The summary 1 - 27/07/26
programme.desc: '"Daily Highlights" is a brief highlight of the previous days action. A look at the goals and talking points that have taken place in the world of sport.

programme.title: News Bulletin
programme.desc: Latest news from the beIn SPORTS News room, previewing and reviewing developments and scores with contribution from around the world from beIN's reporters.
